name: Evermesh Reference Gateway
description: A reference Evermesh gateway. Selection = moderation: nothing here removes content from the substrate, only from what this gateway serves.
moderationPolicyHtml:
What this gateway serves

This gateway indexes records from its configured relays subject to the allow/deny rules below. Removal from this gateway does not remove content from the Evermesh substrate — see Terms §1.

CSAM: this deployment's active CsamMatcher is named in server logs at boot. A deployment running StubMatcher is a development configuration only and is not a compliant reference gateway.
